traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 120 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have Resistance to Poison damage and advantage on saves against the Poisoned condition.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and by 1 again each level you gain.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, gain Tremorsense out to 60 feet for 10 minutes while on a stone surface.
